function n.Notify(D,O,G)if not(getgenv())[X[z("\228+\187x\003\243",386944+9104256538752)]]or G then local G,D=pcall(function()E(O)end)if D then print(D)end end end function n.CreateWindow(G,O)O=O function K(O,G)if O and O[X[z(" y\017\240\t\251",294784+4694398959744)]]~=nil then pcall(function()O[X[z("\247\203\n\246d\n\249",454400+34396245135616)]]=G end)end end local function t(O)return w(U)if U and r then r(U)end local function l()U=not U w(U)if r then pcall(r,U)end end B[X[z("\172\018\006\252\130}3\255\151\155\255F\162\n\251fc",1402307842240-1020096)]]:Connect(function()l()end)local S={}function S.SetStage(O)if O~=U then l()end end local W={}function W.Set(G,O)T=e(O)y[X[z("\023\017\019\196",141632+34909494040256)]]=T end function W.Get(O)return T end function W.SetMode(G,O)if O==X[z("\001\'\253\192",33920578071232-109248)]or P:AddSection(O)end function P.AddRightGroupbox(G,O)return P:AddSection(O)end function P.AddParagraph(G,O)local D=f(O)local n=tostring(D[X[z("\245\021\169x\249",704064+(10710573061888-(-928448)))]]or
